text: New offeror: : Apollo has emerged with a higher 715p/share cash possible offer vs Castlelake’s latest 690p, and easyJet’s board is now minded to recommend Apollo. PUSU 7 Aug 2026.
LondonMetric-SREIT Condortium revised its all-share possible offer to 77.0p/share; Picton board remains minded to recommend
Scheme document published. Shareholder vote will be 3 August
Prologis urges SEGRO shareholders to encourage the SEGRO Board to engage
Toscafund's PUSU deadline extended to 6 August - financing being finalised
Extension of PUSU deadline to 15 July 2026
Offer document published with an unconditional date of 29 July. IDH's Independent Directors recommend the shareholders not to accept the offer
Extension of PUSU deadline to 5 August 2026
